_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill it in. config.json is git-ignored and stays only on your PC.
_loginUrl_note: The page where you normally sign in to Apna as an employer. You log in here ONCE, by hand (password + OTP). After that the bot reuses the saved session.
_intervalHours_note: How often to pull new applicants. 6 = four times a day. Set 0 to run once and exit.
_jobs_note: One entry per Apna job you want synced. 'ourJobId' is the job's ID in this recruitment system. 'applicantsUrl' is the page you see when you click a job and view its applicants. 'exportButtonSelector' is how the bot finds the Download/Export button — leave the placeholder and send me a screenshot of the applicants page and I'll fill it in.
